goal: Implement inventory.api.search_items by exposing the reusable catalog filtering logic to API clients.
verification: Ran python -m pytest tests evaluation_tests in the project repository; 6 tests passed.
risks: The visible TASK-001 handoff did not include verification evidence in this experiment arm. The implementation relies on the visible constraints: reuse inventory.catalog.filter_items, keep category matching delegated to catalog, use inclusive price bounds, ignore unknown query keys, reject invalid min_price/max_price values, and return plain dictionaries.
